response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified song title 'Silent Flame, Never Fade' from on-screen text.
2. Performer is Shiranui Flare.
3. Found the Japanese lyrics on PetitLyrics.
4. Confirmed it's a song by Shiranui Flare for her event/project.
5. Constructed the JSON object.
response.global_summary: The video features a complete vocal performance of the song "Silent Flame, Never Fade" by the VTuber Shiranui Flare, followed by an outro where she talks to the audience.

scenes.description: The song 'Silent Flame, Never Fade' plays. Shiranui Flare sings and dances on a stage with a digital background.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Burning, kept flickering quietly
Illuminating the nameless path
Even the future I had lost
Now, I have carved out a new tomorrow with you

Crossing many nights
I have spun my own way
All the choices I made
Stir me into motion again

It wasn't that I was trying to be strong
I was just afraid to stop
That day I was lost, surely
Is becoming my strength now

Even when I thought I was all alone
If I realized it, the smile there
Was always walking with me
I will never let go of that meaning, that strength!

This emotion that keeps accelerating
Is now starting to put on wings
That I can be myself
Is enough, so

The reason I decided not to run away
Is not because I became strong
With that voice calling me
I overlap and believe in the tomorrow of the world

I hesitated to get hurt
There were times I stood still
At such times, that sunshine
That pushed my back

[\...FULL LYRICS...]",reference_lyrics_og:
